title: The Workbench on a Real Repo

questions.question: What is the goal of running the same task through prompt-only and workbench-guided pipelines?
questions.question_zh: 为什么要把同一个任务分别用「纯 prompt」和「workbench 引导」两条管道跑一遍？
options: To produce a before/after report you can hand to a skeptic with numbers, not arguments
options_zh: 产出一份可以递给怀疑者的「前后对比报告」，用数字而不是争论说话
questions.explanation: The numbers do the arguing; the case is made on a real-feeling task, not a toy.
questions.explanation_zh: 让数字替你争论；案例要建立在真实感的任务上，而不是玩具任务。

questions.question: Which is NOT one of the five outcomes measured?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一项不是被测量的五个结果之一？
questions.explanation: The five are tests_actually_run, acceptance_met, files_outside_scope, handoff_quality, reviewer_total.

questions.question: What did LangChain's Anatomy of an Agent Harness measure on Terminal Bench 2.0?
questions.question_zh: LangChain 的《Anatomy of an Agent Harness》在 Terminal Bench 2.0 上测出了什么？
options: Same model moved from outside top 30 to rank five by changing only the harness
Harness changes did not move the rank
options_zh: 所有模型都收敛到前三
同一个模型仅靠换 harness 就从前 30 名之外升到第 5 名
改 harness 没有影响排名
questions.explanation: Twenty-five-rank delta on the same model is the headline harness-vs-model receipt.
questions.explanation_zh: 同模型 25 名的差距，是「harness vs 模型」最有冲击力的证据。

questions.question: What does the preprints.org paper cite as the failure rate for enterprise agent projects?
questions.question_zh: preprints.org 那篇论文给出的企业 agent 项目失败率是多少？
options: About 88% fail to reach production, with failures clustering around runtime, not reasoning
options_zh: 约 88% 无法上生产，失败集中在运行时而非推理能力
questions.explanation: The Harness Engineering for Language Agents preprint traces failures to runtime issues (stale state, brittle retries, overgrown context).
questions.explanation_zh: 《Harness Engineering for Language Agents》预印本把失败追溯到运行时问题（陈旧状态、脆弱重试、上下文膨胀）。

questions.question: What does WebAgent baseline accuracy do in long-context conditions?
questions.question_zh: 在长上下文条件下，WebAgent 基线的准确率会怎样？
options: Drops from 40-50% to under 10% mostly from infinite loops and goal loss
options_zh: 从 40–50% 跌到 10% 以下，主要源于死循环和目标丢失
questions.explanation: Long-context collapse is what the Ralph Loop and handoff packet exist to absorb.
questions.explanation_zh: Ralph Loop 和交接包的存在，正是为了吸收长上下文崩塌带来的冲击。

questions.question: What does the lesson say about false negatives (cases where prompt-only is faster)?
questions.question_zh: 课程怎么看「false negative」——也就是 prompt-only 更快的情形？
options: Single-step factual tasks, one-line lints, formatter runs are faster prompt-only; enumerate them honestly so the workbench is not framed as overkill
options_zh: 单步事实任务、单行 lint、跑格式化等用 prompt-only 更快；要诚实列出来，免得 workbench 被当成杀鸡用牛刀
它们证明 workbench 失败了
它们推翻了 harness 论点
questions.explanation: Honest enumeration of prompt-only-fastest cases keeps the harness argument credible.
questions.explanation_zh: 诚实列出「prompt-only 反而最快」的场景，能让 harness 论点更可信。

questions.question: Where do you cite the report from this lesson?
questions.question_zh: 应该在什么场合引用本课产出的这份报告？
options: When someone wants to drop the verification gate 'just for this sprint', or when a new agent product launches and needs a portable time-savings benchmark
options_zh: 公司内部 HR 评估
当有人想「就这一个 sprint」绕过验证门时，或者新 agent 产品上线、需要一份可移植的省时基准时
questions.explanation: The numbers travel further than the explanation; cite the report when pressure tries to short-circuit surfaces.
questions.explanation_zh: 数字比解释跑得更远；当外部压力想绕过这些 surface 时，把报告甩出去。
